subject: Add IconCreator and PixelEditor gadgets, UI component library, and theming
author: Klemen Kogovsek
body:
- New gadgets: IconCreator (SVG icon builder) and PixelEditor
- Shared UI components: Button, Card, Badge, Input, Text
- lib/utils.ts: cn() helper (clsx + tailwind-merge)
- App.css: theme tokens + per-gadget themes (NLB Win95, pixel retro, etc.)
- CLAUDE.md: document i18n conventions
- i18n: add EN/SL keys for new gadgets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

subject: Add i18n support with English and Slovenian localization
author: Klemen Kogovsek
body:
Introduces react-intl with a LocaleContext provider, EN/SL message files,
and a language toggle in the sidebar. Gadget names and UI strings are now
translatable, with Slovenian README/INFO content for Home and NLB SEPA.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

subject: Add Cloudflare hosting disclosure to privacy policy
author: Klemen Kogovsek
body:
The app is hosted on Cloudflare with observability enabled, but the
policy previously claimed no data collection at all. Added a hosting
infrastructure section in both EN and SL explaining that Cloudflare
processes standard HTTP request metadata as the infrastructure provider.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

subject: Add remark-gfm and multi-currency summary stats in NLB SEPA
author: Klemen Kogovsek
body:
- Add remark-gfm plugin to MarkdownView for GFM table/strikethrough support
- Break down summary stats per currency when multiple currencies are present
- Show info panel by default; hide after first file import
- Add multi-currency hint in sidebar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

subject: Extract shared MarkdownView component, simplify Home and PrivacyPolicy
author: Klemen Kogovsek
body:
Both gadgets now delegate to a single MarkdownView component instead of
duplicating remark rendering logic. Adds a .md?raw type declaration to
env.d.ts and cleans up the README live link formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

subject: Add hash router, sidebar pinBottom support, and NLB SEPA preview panel
author: Klemen Kogovsek
body:
Introduces a lightweight hash-based router (src/router.ts) so gadget
navigation is reflected in the URL. Sidebar gains a pinBottom gadget
concept replacing the hardcoded Privacy Policy button. NLB SEPA gets a
full preview panel with summary stats, CSV data checks, XML consistency
checks, double-accounting checks, and a transaction list view.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

subject: Add Home and Privacy Policy gadgets, NLB SEPA improvements, and pre-commit hooks
author: Klemen Kogovsek
body:
- Add Home landing gadget and Privacy Policy gadget (with markdown rendering)
- Improve NLB SEPA converter UI and logic
- Add husky pre-commit hook running lint checks and tests
- Add markdown deps (react-markdown) for privacy policy rendering
- Update README with app description and deployment URL
- Update Cloudflare Workers config (wrangler.jsonc)
- Add TODO.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
